sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Mizuho reiterates Range Resources stock rating on steady execution
feed.summary: Mizuho has reiterated an Outperform rating and a $49.00 price target for Range Resources (NYSE:RRC) due to its steady operational and financial execution, deep resource base, and above-peer capital efficiency. The firm anticipates Range Resources will surpass first-quarter 2026 EBITDA and free cash flow estimates. The company recently reported strong Q4 2025 financial results, exceeding analyst expectations, and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: iShares MSCI World ETF Braces for a Tumultuous Quarter
feed.summary: The iShares MSCI World ETF (URTH) is facing a challenging Q2 2026 due to new U.S. tariffs impacting healthcare and technology sectors, intense fee competition from rival ETFs, and a significant change to MSCI's index calculation methodology. Despite these headwinds, institutional investors like the Royal Bank of Canada are maintaining their positions due to the fund's liquidity and track record, although Morningstar noted its pricing could be more aggressive. Investors are also looking forward to the next ex-dividend date in June 2026.

feed.title: Greenbrier Q1 2026 Earnings Miss, Revenue Down 22.9% | NYSE:GBX - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Greenbrier (NYSE:GBX) reported a significant miss in its first-quarter 2026 earnings, with revenue falling 22.9% year-over-year and GAAP earnings per share coming in 45.7% below consensus. The company also cut its full-year guidance, with midpoint revenue and GAAP EPS forecasts 15.3% and 21.2% below analyst estimates, respectively. Despite these challenges, Greenbrier saw an improvement in its free cash flow margin, which rose to 14.9%.

feed.title: Baxter International Provides FY 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Baxter International (NYSE:BAX) has released its financial guidance for fiscal year 2026, projecting revenues between $11.2 billion and $11.4 billion and earnings per share in the range of $1.85 to $2.05. These figures are in line with or slightly above current analyst consensus estimates. The guidance offers investors an important outlook on the company's financial performance and growth within the medical device industry.

feed.title: Jana Partners buys Lamb Weston (LW) shares worth $9.7 million
feed.summary: Jana Partners Management, LP recently purchased $9.7 million worth of Lamb Weston Holdings Inc (NYSE:LW) shares across two transactions on April 7 and April 8, 2026. These purchases increased their total holdings to 5,248,980 shares. Simultaneously, Lamb Weston has updated its financial outlook for fiscal 2026 with higher sales expectations, but analysts have adjusted price targets downwards due to challenges in international markets.

feed.title: Azz Inc. Announces Cash Dividend for the Fourth Quarter of Fiscal Year 2026, Payable on May 14, 2026
feed.summary: AZZ Inc. has announced a cash dividend of $0.20 per share for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2026. This dividend is payable on May 14, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 23, 2026. The announcement was made by the company's Board of Directors.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin wins $4.76 billion missile production contract
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) has been awarded a $4.76 billion firm-fixed-price contract by the U.S. Department of War for the production of PAC-3 Missile Segment Enhancement missiles. The contract includes all related services, hardware, equipment, technical planning, management, and manufacturing efforts. Work will be performed across 15 locations and is expected to be completed by June 30, 2030, with funding from both Army funds and Foreign Military Sales.

feed.title: Mission Produce Shareholders Reaffirm Board and Executive Pay
feed.summary: Mission Produce shareholders re-elected three directors, approved executive compensation, and ratified Deloitte & Touche LLP as the independent auditor at their virtual annual meeting on April 9, 2026. The company successfully maintained its current board composition and received strong support for its pay practices and financial oversight. An analyst rating on Mission Produce (AVO) stock currently stands at a Buy with a $15.50 price target.

feed.title: FactSet Research Systems Inc (FDS) Shares Fall 4.2% -- What GF S
feed.summary: FactSet Research Systems Inc (FDS) shares dropped 4.2% to $213.52, indicating significant undervaluation by 57.2% compared to its GF Value of $498.63. Despite a strong GF Score of 79/100, excellent profitability and growth ratings, the stock shows weak momentum and recent insider selling, suggesting potential risks alongside its attractive valuation. Investors are advised to consider both the undervaluation and the low momentum/insider selling activity.

feed.title: Dow Inc (DOW) Shares Fall 3.2% -- What GF Score of 62 Tells Investors
feed.summary: Dow Inc (DOW) shares fell 3.2% to $38.04, placing its current price 4.8% below its GF Value of $39.96, suggesting a slight undervaluation on paper. Despite an above-average GF Score of 62/100, driven by its profitability, the company exhibits low growth and momentum ranks and recent lack of insider transactions, indicating potential risks for investors. The article advises caution due to financial strength concerns and disparities between its forward P/E and historical valuations.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Remains Bullish on Antero Resources (AR)
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has reiterated its "Buy" rating on Antero Resources (AR) and raised its price target from $46 to $54. This decision is driven by higher oil prices and LNG and refining margins, which have reached levels not seen since 2022 due to the conflict with Iran. The firm also increased its commodity price assumptions for 2026 and 2027, leading to a significant bump in EBITDA estimates for North American energy companies, including Antero Resources.

feed.title: Insider Selling: lululemon athletica (NASDAQ:LULU) Insider Sells 622 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: lululemon athletica director Nicole Neuburger sold 622 shares of the company's stock on April 8th at an average price of $161, totaling over $100,000 and reducing her position by 3.14%. This insider sale comes as LULU shares recently jumped 4.8% to $166.51 after the company reported better-than-expected EPS, though revenue remained flat year-over-year. Analysts currently hold a "Hold" consensus rating for Lululemon, with an average price target of $206.77.

feed.title: Annovis Bio (ANVS) raises ~$10M via 5.26M-share registered direct offering
feed.summary: Annovis Bio (ANVS) has announced a registered direct offering of 5.26 million shares of common stock, combined with warrants to purchase an equal number of additional shares, at a price of $1.90 per unit. The offering is expected to generate approximately $9.175 million in net proceeds, which the company plans to allocate towards the continued Phase 3 clinical development of its lead compound, buntanetap, for Alzheimer's disease, as well as for general working capital and corporate needs. Post-offering, the outstanding shares are projected to be around 34.53 million, highlighting a dilution for existing shareholders.

feed.title: Alphatec (NASDAQ: ATEC) GC nets 79,107 shares in option exercise
feed.summary: Alphatec Holdings, Inc.'s General Counsel, Marshall Tyson Eliot, exercised 102,500 employee stock options on April 7, 2026, in a cashless transaction. This resulted in a net acquisition of 79,107 shares after 23,393 shares were withheld to cover exercise prices, bringing his direct holdings to 638,566 shares. The event is characterized as a routine equity compensation exercise rather than a market sale.

feed.title: What Amgen (AMGN)'s TEPEZZA On‑Body Injector Phase 3 Results Mean For Shareholders
feed.summary: Amgen reported positive Phase 3 results for a subcutaneous, on-body injector version of TEPEZZA for Thyroid Eye Disease, showing a significant 77% proptosis response rate. This new delivery method aims for greater patient convenience and could enhance Amgen's competitive position in the thyroid eye disease market. While the results are positive, Amgen's overall investment narrative remains focused on diversifying its portfolio, offsetting biosimilar erosion, and managing R&D costs. Shareholders should consider these factors alongside the potential benefits of new formulations.

feed.title: Corning Inc. stock: AI boom drives surge — what investors need to know
feed.summary: Corning Inc. (GLW) shares surged due to increased demand for AI infrastructure and a significant multiyear deal with Meta Platforms worth up to $6 billion, positioning the company as a key player in data center optical connectivity. Corning's core business in specialized glass and optical fiber has shifted its focus to AI data centers, offering investors exposure to the rapidly expanding AI market. While analysts are generally positive, caution is advised due to elevated valuations, suggesting potential investors consider waiting for a dip or using dollar-cost averaging.

feed.title: Atmos Energy will release Q2 results May 6, hold call May 7
feed.summary: Atmos Energy Corporation (NYSE: ATO) will host a conference call on May 7, 2026, at 10 a.m. Eastern to discuss its Fiscal 2026 second quarter financial results. The company plans to release these results on May 6, 2026, after the market closes. Interested parties can access the call via a toll-free number, an international number, or a live webcast on the company's website.

feed.title: Direxion Daily AAPL Bear 1X Shares (AAPD) stock price, news, quote and history
feed.summary: This article provides detailed financial information for Direxion Daily AAPL Bear 1X Shares (AAPD), an inverse ETF designed to provide 1X daily inverse exposure to Apple (AAPL). It includes real-time stock quotes, historical performance data, key financial metrics like volume, expense ratio, and net assets, and an overview of the fund's investment strategy. The page also features related tickers and mentions some recent news, although the content for the news section is not included.

feed.title: Wells Fargo and KeyBanc Bullish on ATI
feed.summary: Wells Fargo and KeyBanc analysts have initiated coverage on ATI Inc. (NYSE:ATI) with "Overweight" ratings. Wells Fargo set a price target of $175, citing growing market share and higher pricing from long-term contracts, while KeyBanc set a target of $140, maintaining a positive outlook on the US carbon steel sector's profitability. ATI Inc. is a producer of high-performance materials for aerospace, defense, and specialty energy markets.

feed.title: Seagate (STX) Added to Top Pick List by Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has added Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ:STX) to its Top Pick list, raising its price target from $468 to $582 and maintaining an Overweight rating. This upgrade is based on strengthening demand for hard disk drives, which analysts believe could lead to shortages until 2028, and a stronger-than-expected price per terabyte. The firm improved its profit margin and EPS forecasts for Seagate, which is a data storage and technology company.

feed.title: AN2 Therapeutics Launches New $80 Million ATM Program
feed.summary: AN2 Therapeutics (ANTX) has established a new $80 million at-the-market (ATM) stock sale program with Jefferies to issue common stock. This move replaces a previous ATM agreement with TD Securities, under which the company had raised approximately $20 million. The company's stock currently holds a Hold rating with a $3.50 price target from analysts, while TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark rates ANTX as Neutral due to weak financial performance despite positive technicals.

feed.title: Did Starbucks Corporation Insiders Breach their Fiduciary Duties to Shareholders?
feed.summary: Halper Sadeh LLC, an investor rights law firm, is investigating whether certain officers and directors of Starbucks Corporation (NASDAQ: SBUX) breached their fiduciary duties to shareholders. The firm encourages long-term shareholders of Starbucks stock to contact them to discuss their legal rights and options, which may include seeking corporate governance reforms or the return of funds to the company. Halper Sadeh LLC operates on a contingent fee basis, meaning shareholders would not be responsible for upfront legal fees.

feed.title: Citigroup Reaches New 52-Week High
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc. (NYSE:C) stock reached a new 52-week high of $125.48, closing at $125.04 on heavy trading volume, indicating strong investor optimism. This surge is supported by positive analyst sentiment, with several firms reiterating 'buy' ratings and increasing price targets. The consensus is a 'Moderate Buy' for Citigroup, highlighting its robust financial performance and diversified business model.

feed.title: Rosen Law Firm Encourages zSpace Inc. Investors to Inquire About Securities Class Action Investigation - ZSPC
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm has initiated an investigation into potential securities claims on behalf of zSpace Inc. (NASDAQ: ZSPC) shareholders. This follows allegations that zSpace Inc. may have provided materially misleading business information to investors. The firm is preparing a class action lawsuit to recover investor losses.

feed.title: Pentair plc stock: Water tech leader poised for growth amid global demand
feed.summary: Pentair plc (PNR) is highlighted as a key player in water management solutions, well-positioned for growth due to increasing global water challenges and demand for efficient filtration and smart systems. The company's diversified business model, innovation in sustainable solutions, and presence in essential sectors like residential, commercial, and industrial water needs make it appealing to investors. Analysts view Pentair as a solid hold, benefiting from sustainability tailwinds and resilient demand, despite potential risks like supply chain pressures and competition.

feed.title: Moody’s upgrades NagaCorp rating due to higher earnings and cash flow, strong liquidity position
feed.summary: Moody's Ratings has upgraded NagaCorp's corporate family rating from "B3" to "B2" with a stable outlook, citing improved earnings and cash flow as well as a strong liquidity position. The ratings agency expects NagaCorp to continue generating over US$400 million in EBITDA in 2026 and highlighted sufficient cash and deposits to cover debt maturities. While capital spending for the Naga 3 expansion remains an unknown, Moody's expects it to be manageable and funded through internally generated cash flows.

feed.title: Target (TGT) CAO boosts deferred stock-linked units in amended Form 4/A
feed.summary: Target Corporation's Chief Accounting Officer, Matthew A. Liegel, increased his holdings of deferred compensation units linked to Target common stock by 3,425.8308 units, as reported in an amended Form 4/A filing. These units, valued at $116.76 each, are part of the company's Executive Deferred Compensation Plan and are economically equivalent to common shares but are paid out in cash. The amendment clarifies the number of units acquired and includes investment earnings/losses since a previous filing, bringing Liegel's total to 7,134.7280 deferred compensation units.

feed.title: Dollar Tree Issues Q1 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Dollar Tree (NASDAQ:DLTR) has released its Q1 2026 earnings guidance, projecting EPS between $1.45 and $1.60 and revenue between $4.9 billion and $5.0 billion, which falls generally in line with consensus estimates. The company also updated its full-year 2026 EPS guidance to $6.50-$6.90. Following this announcement, the stock traded down 2.9% to $102.60.

feed.title: Ford exceeds West Tennessee investment goal one year into Good Neighbor Plan
feed.summary: Ford Motor Co. has surpassed its initial $9 million investment goal for its Good Neighbor Plan in West Tennessee, having donated nearly $11.7 million to over 90 organizations within a 15-mile radius of its BlueOval City campus. This achievement comes just one year into the program, significantly exceeding its multi-year target.

feed.title: Mission Produce (NASDAQ: AVO) 2026 meeting backs directors, pay and auditor
feed.summary: Mission Produce, Inc. held its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on April 9, 2026, where shareholders approved the election of three director nominees: Stephen J. Barnard, Laura Flanagan, and Linda B. Segre. Stockholders also passed a non-binding advisory vote for the compensation of named executive officers and ratified Deloitte & Touche LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for fiscal year 2026. The meeting saw strong participation, with approximately 78.56% of outstanding shares represented, signifying solid support for the company's governance and a robust quorum.

feed.title: Veralto (NYSE:VLTO) Price Target Lowered to $99.00 at UBS Group
feed.summary: UBS Group has lowered its price target for Veralto (NYSE:VLTO) to $99.00 while maintaining a "neutral" rating, indicating a potential upside of 10.45%. Despite this, the stock holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $108.44. Veralto recently reported strong quarterly EPS of $1.04, exceeding expectations, and provided optimistic FY2026 EPS guidance.

feed.title: International Flavors & Fragrances (NYSE:IFF) Price Target Lowered to $75.00 at UBS Group
feed.summary: UBS Group has lowered its price target for International Flavors & Fragrances (NYSE:IFF) from $85.00 to $75.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating. Despite this, the broader analyst consensus remains moderately positive with an average price target of $89.28. Insider Paul J. Fribourg recently purchased 142,000 shares, indicating strong confidence in the stock.

feed.title: Hologic (HOLX) SVP stock converted at $76 plus CVR in merger
feed.summary: Diana De Walt, SVP of Human Resources at Hologic (HOLX), disposed of 7,603 shares due to the company's merger with Hopper Parent Inc. Each share was converted into $76.00 in cash plus one contingent value right (CVR) potentially worth up to $3.00. This transaction resulted in De Walt no longer beneficially owning any Hologic common shares.

feed.title: Afya (AFYA) vice president sells 26,753 Class A shares in open-market trade
feed.summary: Afya Ltd's Vice President, Junior Lelio de Souza, sold 26,753 Class A common shares in an open-market transaction at $14.95 per share. Following this sale, he now directly holds 16,279 shares. The transaction, reported via an SEC Form 4 filing, is a straightforward net sale and does not involve any derivatives.

feed.title: Digi Power X Enters into Amended and Restated Sales Agreement
feed.summary: Digi Power X Inc., an innovative energy infrastructure company pivoting into AI data centers, announced it has entered into an amended and restated sales agreement with A.G.P./Alliance Global Partners. This agreement establishes an "at-the-market" equity offering program, allowing the company to sell up to US$75 million in subordinate voting shares. The proceeds will be used for general corporate purposes, including funding operations, data center construction, debt repayment, and potential acquisitions to expand its AI and High-Performance Computing (HPC) network.

feed.title: Aletheia Capital Remains a Buy on Advanced Micro Devices (AMD)
feed.summary: Aletheia Capital has reiterated a Buy rating on Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) with a $333 price target, viewing the company as a key beneficiary of the next stage of AI, specifically Agentic AI. The firm highlights AMD's leadership in server CPUs and its evolution into a full-stack AI compute provider, driven by anticipated growth in GPU market share and massive expansion in server CPU demand for AI-intensive workloads. While acknowledging general investment risks, Aletheia Capital sees strong growth engines for AMD in the evolving AI landscape.

feed.title: Afya (AFYA) VP legal executes open-market sale of 5,000 shares
feed.summary: Anibal Jose Grifo de Sousa, VP Legal, Compliance and Government Relations at Afya Ltd (AFYA), sold 5,000 Class A Common Shares in an open-market transaction on April 7, 2026, at $15.20 per share. Following this sale, he retains direct ownership of 45,000 Class A Common Shares, indicating a continued significant stake in the company. The transaction was filed as a Form 4, providing transparency into insider trading activity.

feed.title: Xcel Energy Inc stock: Why utilities stability draws smart investors now
feed.summary: Xcel Energy Inc (XEL) is presented as a stable investment option with growth potential in the renewable energy sector, serving 3.7 million electric and 2.1 million natural gas customers across eight US states. The article highlights Xcel's predictable returns due to its regulated model, consistent dividends, and significant investments in clean energy infrastructure, aligning with ESG trends. Analysts view Xcel favorably for its defensive growth, strong balance sheet, and progress toward decarbonization goals, making it attractive for investors seeking stability amidst market volatility.

feed.title: Analyst Sentiment on Booking Holdings (BKNG) Remains Strong Despite Near-Term Concerns
feed.summary: Despite near-term concerns and economic uncertainties, analyst sentiment regarding Booking Holdings Inc. (BKNG) remains strong, with over 80% of covering analysts maintaining bullish ratings influenced by a positive long-term travel demand forecast. However, Wells Fargo recently lowered its price target due to anticipated cautious management tone and lower European booking trends stemming from Middle East tensions. The company has also announced leadership changes, with Kurt Sievers joining the board, aligning with Booking's evolving strategic goals.

feed.title: Insulet stock: What investors need to know amid diabetes tech boom
feed.summary: Insulet, known for its innovative Omnipod insulin delivery system, is a key player in the expanding diabetes management market. Despite strong growth and positive analyst sentiment, a recent product issue with Omnipod 5 Pod lots has raised questions for investors regarding product reliability and potential legal scrutiny. The article advises investors to monitor resolution updates and competitive developments closely, considering Insulet a "Moderate Buy" for long-term growth-oriented portfolios.

feed.title: Hologic (HOLX) director exits equity as merger pays $76 cash plus CVR
feed.summary: Hologic, Inc. director Stacey D. Stewart reported the disposition of 15,049 non-qualified stock options and 8,358 shares of common stock to the company. These transactions were a direct result of a completed merger where each Hologic common share was converted into $76.00 in cash and one contingent value right of up to $3.00. Stewart no longer beneficially owns Hologic common stock, as his equity awards were converted according to the merger agreement.

feed.title: Hologic (HOLX) director exits position as merger pays $76 plus CVRs
feed.summary: Hologic, Inc. director Christiana Stamoulis has disposed of all her equity holdings in the company, including 50,526 shares of common stock and various non-qualified stock options, as part of a merger deal. Under the terms of the merger, each share of Hologic common stock was converted into the right to receive $76.00 in cash plus one contingent value right (CVR) that could pay up to an additional $3.00 per share. This transaction leaves Ms. Stamoulis with no remaining Hologic equity.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands says all ESG goals in workforce development, community volunteerism and carbon emissions reduction achieved for 2021 to 2025 period
feed.summary: Las Vegas Sands Corp (LVS) has announced that it achieved all of its environmental, social, and governance (ESG) goals for the 2021-2025 period, according to its 2025 ESG report. The company surpassed targets in workforce development by investing over US$270 million and in community volunteerism with more than 290,000 Team Member hours. LVS also reduced its scope 1 and 2 carbon emissions by 54% and increased operational waste diversion by 10%, exceeding its "Planet pillar" objectives.

feed.title: AZZ declares $0.20 quarterly dividend, payable May 14 By Investing.com
feed.summary: AZZ Inc. announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share, payable on May 14, 2026, continuing its 17-year dividend payment history. The company's stock has surged by nearly 60% over the past year, and it has issued strong financial guidance for fiscal year 2027. Recent news also includes analyst rating changes and leadership appointments within AZZ.

feed.title: Garda to acquire Assertio (Nasdaq: ASRT) in $125.1M cash deal plus CVR
feed.summary: Garda Therapeutics is set to acquire Assertio Holdings (ASRT) in an all-cash tender offer of $18 per share, totaling $125.1 million, plus one contingent value right (CVR) per share. This deal represents a 34.6% premium to Assertio's unaffected share price. Concurrently, Assertio divested its non-Rolvedon assets to Cosette Pharmaceuticals for $35 million upfront plus potential milestones, with some SPRIX-related milestones flowing to Assertio shareholders via the CVRs.

feed.title: Lululemon (LULU) brand chief sells 622 shares at $161
feed.summary: Lululemon's Chief Brand Officer, Nicole Neuberger, executed an open-market sale of 622 shares of LULU common stock at a price of $161.00 per share on April 8, 2026. This transaction amounted to approximately $100,142, and Neuberger still directly holds 19,156 shares after the sale. The filing indicated a moderate impact and negative sentiment, although the detailed report explicitly stated "None" for both positive and negative implications.

feed.title: Syncari Named a Visionary in 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Master Data Management
feed.summary: Syncari, a leader in data unification and automation, has been recognized as a Visionary in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Master Data Management. This acknowledgment highlights a shift towards real-time, automation-first MDM solutions that ensure continuously managed and trusted data across all systems, moving beyond traditional fragmented approaches. Syncari's agentic MDM platform supports operational execution and AI readiness by unifying, governing, and distributing master data in real time for enterprises ranging from mid-market to Global 1000.

feed.title: EOG Resources raises Q1 2026 tax expense outlook on higher oil prices
feed.summary: EOG Resources has significantly increased its Q1 2026 current tax expense outlook to $500-$600 million due to higher realized crude oil prices and strong profitability, up from a previous forecast of $230-$330 million. Analysts predict strong earnings for EOG, with many revising their estimates upwards, and the stock is considered to have potential upside as it trades below its Fair Value according to InvestingPro data. The company's updated guidance also mentions a $53 million net cash payment for commodity derivative contracts, with no cash received yet from a natural gas sales agreement linked to Brent crude that begins in 2027.

feed.title: Hologic (HOLX) director exits stake as Hopper merger pays cash and CVRs
feed.summary: Hologic director Wayde D. McMillan has reported the disposition of his equity in the company following its merger with Hopper Parent Inc. McMillan surrendered his non-qualified stock options and common stock, with his time-vesting restricted stock units also converted as per the merger agreement. He no longer beneficially owns any Hologic common stock, with each share converting into $76.00 in cash and one contingent value right potentially worth an additional $3.00.

feed.title: A Look at Intercontinental Exchange Inc (ICE) After 3.5% Decline -- GF Value $160.69 vs Price $161.97
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange Inc (ICE) recently experienced a 3.5% stock decline, bringing its price to $161.97, which is slightly above its GuruFocus fair value of $160.69, indicating it is 0.8% overvalued. Despite a strong GF Score of 80/100, reflecting solid profitability but moderate financial strength, significant insider selling totaling $55.1 million over the last three months raises potential concerns for investors. The company's P/E ratio is currently 28.1x, which is below its 5-year median, suggesting it trades lower than historical valuation levels.
